title: Deliciously Dense Croatian Pork Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful Croatian dish featuring fermented pork, praline glaze, and Mediterranean spices, perfect for a lazy Sunday afternoon. This recipe combines the richness of pork with the sweetness of praline and the warmth of Mediterranean spices.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the fermented pork shoulder and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the praline syrup, tomato paste, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the cooked rice to the pot and stir to combine.
Cover the pot and transfer to the preheated oven.
Bake for 30 minutes, or until the pilaf is heated through and the flavors have melded together.
